abandoned heretic pet  

Undead
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

Category: EverQuest

Minimum Level: 7
Maximum Level: 9
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Twilight Bloom

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Druid Epic 1.5: Staff of Living Brambles

Report a correction

Post Comment
no faction hits
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2016 at 12:37 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
No hits when killed.

[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] Your Crude Adept's Mantle flickers with a pale light.
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] Your Crude Defiant Plate Helm feels alive with power.
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] Halleb hit abandoned heretic pet for 121 points of non-melee damage.
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] You have slain abandoned heretic pet!
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] --You have looted a Rusty Mining Pick.--
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:09 2015] --You have looted a Bone Chips.--
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:12 2015] Your Crude Adept's Mantle flickers with a pale light.
[Sat Aug 29 11:18:12 2015] Your spell fizzles!

Edited, Jun 17th 2016 2:37pm by drool
▲ Page top
What I did to get the quest to work
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2012 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791893359
7 posts
I stood at the entrance doorway and waited for the pet to say to the skeletons to---- speed up digging and they responded that their not its pets---
The pet leaves I run up target on the skeleton on the left and say what animated heads? I finally got the pick handed to me after talking to the skeleton and I equip the pick. The skeletons leave and I hit escape to get him off my target. I stand in the middle of the hall a couple steps up and to the side of the back fire pit. Loc -1991.16 -211.92 49.57 (?). I start spamming my song. Just saying----A skeleton's day is never done.----- I got the emote Your voice echoes nicely from the walls. If I had something in my target window I didn't get the emote. I had to make sure my target window was empty to get the emote that came up almost every time I spammed my song. If you don't get the emote then something is wrong and you will fail and from what I read the respawn time for the skeleton's is around 2 hours. I worked on this for 3 days before I got it right. When the pet came back I clicked on him (target him) and as soon as he says his thing about---- where those fools go off to----- slap your hot key ---- I am on the job.---- He turns to you and says his thing about not breaking a nail and I clicked my escape button to get him off target and went back to spamming my song. He disappears and several minutes later walks back up and you target him he gets done saying his thing about-- where the fools go off to-- again say ---I'm on the job----. Hit escape to get him off target again and go back to spamming your song. Make sure the emote still comes up. This goes on for around a half hour before the skeleton comes back and hands me the Animating Heads. I hope this helps.

Sweetnezz
66 Druid
▲ Page top
What I did to get the quest to work

Faction for Newbie Monster
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2006 at 9:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1688948237917
View User Forum
236 posts
Turn in Useless Cloth Cap, and you get a random gem,
abandoned heretic pet says, â€œGood work, you should be running this operation instead of that Talrigar fellow. Have a small reward. A little bit of the gems I found while tunneling through this rock.
Your faction standing with Newbie Monster got better.
You gain experience!! At level 5 I got a blue and a Hematite gem.
▲ Page top
Druid 1.5 stuff
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2006 at 9:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783650955
View User Forum
Scholar
26 posts
Ok I spent ages with this one, mainly cus i put the wrong text in but I hope this helps someone not waste the time I did.

Go to the skellies in the passage. Wait for abandoned to walk back (although I don't think it makes much difference as to when he walked back, i've done it and he had already been gone a while). Hail skelly on right and do the dialogue stuff. Get the pick and equip. ok now heres what you hot keys should be;

/say Yo ho. No sun!!
/say A skeleton's day is never done
/say A skeleton's day is never done
/say A skeleton's day is never done
/say A skeleton's day is never done

and

/say I am on the job.

now i messed up a fair bit (i put a skeleton's work is never done instead) but it seems it doesn't take much to get it to work again.

once you get the pick stand approx where that skelly was, press escape or whatever you keys are to loose any target and start spamming your first hot key you will see the emote coming up bout your voice echoing. keep spamming it over and over even if noone but ou sees all the lines being said.

now when the pet comes back don't target him just spam your second hot key as soon as he speaks to you, he will walk off again. Keep spamming hot key 1 over and over and the pet will probalby come back a few times keep using hotkey 2 everytime he comes back and spamming hotkey 1 in between.

Hopefully this should work for you, for refresh, make sure you get text exactly right, make sure you don't have any targets and if you mess up a little just spam again.

On my final successful attempt I was still spamming the wrong thing for about 3 of the times the pet came back in the 30 mins, i then corrected it and continued, only had him come back about twice before the other skelly turned up and i got the item.

Good luck and hope this helps.

Moonrize, Sunrize, Starrize
3 boxer 70 War, Druid, Chanter on Zek
▲ Page top
Druid 1.5 stuff
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2011 at 9:18 PM Rating: Default
LoafyRaisinswirl
153 posts
NightAngel the Charming wrote:




now when the pet comes back don't target him just spam your second hot key as soon as he speaks to you, he will walk off again. Keep spamming hot key 1 over and over and the pet will probalby come back a few times keep using hotkey 2 everytime he comes back and spamming hotkey 1 in between.




Do NOT take this advice, if you do not target the pet and then use the second hotkey after he reacts, the pet gets angry at the two skeletons not being there and you fail and you'll see

abandon heretic pet shouts ; I've had it with those two loafers. i'll have their bony heads for this!'

and then:

a skeleton shouts 'You'd better not be there when we get back, druid! It was a simple task and you couldn't handle it.'

I only found this post after the pet had shown up 9 times in 32 minutes and nothing was happening. So I tried it this way and failed and had to start ALL over. Thanks for that.

Starting over changing nothing it only took 7 pet appearances and closer to the 30 minute deadline.

▲ Page top
the conspiricy
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2002 at 9:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778490362
52 posts
Next time your in tox go to the abandoned heretic pet house This house has a history,

origanally it was the guild house for evils but it was to small to little merchants and erusite guards were everwhere, as far as i know there was no paineel side you just sat down and cried every time a guard killed you

Boom they made the war killed of miragul ( yes miragul was in tox once) and made him a hero to all

miragul lays in everfrost part of the pally epic and well only abandoned heretics and there pets use the crummy old house now

Heres the catch **** drum roll**** well i wanna keep everyone wondering so click on the pot filled with fire in the middle of the house

if anyone has seen these pots of fire newhere else say something ( BTW if your a rougue you'll be especially inerested)

Edited, Sat Jul 20 22:07:50 2002

me a lv 11 mage and a lv 9 twinked warrior found these things they conned blue cleared the room the first time than second time round i hadnt summoned pet and he was at half health we got killed by em... first time when i saw them i conned one and it was called decaying skeleton then when i attacked changed to heretic pet

i hope you killed em twiked i been soloing em since 7th and almost naked
▲ Page top
Not that bad
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2001 at 2:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
With my untwinked Erudite Necro, I could take these at lvl 7, and barely make it, once I hit lvl 8 they were much easier. They are non agro (at least to an evil necro, but I think to others as well) but will agro you if they see you fighting another skel. There is no faction hit for killing em, and until the warrens opened, they were the only real exp (other then random skells and snakes that conned low blue) for lvl 7 and 8 characters.
▲ Page top
Tougher than they con
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2001 at 3:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780869250
68 posts
They guys are nasty, hit for 13 dmg. An even con will still wupp on you. My twinked cleric tried camping the Paineel entrance for this guy alone.

Ended up fearing him and then gating the hell out, made it with 11 hps.

Good for a group, all you need is another level 6 to 8 to help and you're good till 10 in this zone.
▲ Page top
Mining Cap Quest
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2000 at 8:27 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The loot you get depends on who you give the caps to.

The 2 skeletons that are doing the mining will either give you bone chips, zombie skin, a bone shield, or the fractured femur.

The Abandoned Pet will give you a random gem.
▲ Page top
More than meets the eye
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2000 at 3:01 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This MOB actually has a quest built into him. Wait for him to talk to the skeleton miners in the tunnel to Paineel and listen to their conversation. You will learn that these skeletons want mining caps. Not coincidentally, kobold scouts seem to drop a lot of those useless cloth caps.

Giving cloth caps to the miners and heretic pet will often yield bone chips, but I've been able to get Malachite, Lapis Lazuli, and a Fractured Femur (piercing weapon, 5 dmg, 27 delay).

Not bad loot if you have bunch of useless cloth caps, eh?
▲ Page top
